message:
Add CLI utility commands: categories, tags, open, doctor, about

- categories: List all categories with prompt counts
- tags: List all tags with counts, sorted by popularity
- open <id>: Launch browser to prompt permalink
- doctor: Check environment (skills dirs, clipboard, registry)
- about: Show ASCII banner with ecosystem info

All commands support --json output for agent integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
